description_long: This is a large, four-engine propeller-driven airplane with a straight, mid-mounted wing configuration and a conventional tail. The fuselage is elongated and cylindrical, with a rounded nose and a tapered rear section leading to a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The engines are mounted on the leading edge of the wings, with each wing supporting two engines, and the propellers are clearly visible. The landing gear appears to be retractable, with the main gear housed under the wings and a nose gear under the forward fuselage. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, featuring multiple windows for visibility. The exterior is primarily metallic gray with subtle blue accents, and the surface finish is matte with some weathering visible.
description: A large, four-engine propeller airplane with a straight mid-wing, conventional tail, and metallic gray finish. The cockpit is forward-mounted with multiple windows, and the landing gear is retractable.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, four engines with propellers, and the overall straight wing and tail configuration.
description_view_1: Side profile view highlighting the slim fuselage, propeller placement, and the vertical stabilizer at the tail.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view displaying the underwing engine mounts, landing gear housings, and the full length of the fuselage.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the propellers, cockpit windows, and the alignment of the tail surfaces.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Four wing-mounted piston engines with propellers.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
